scripts.electron:dev: pnpm --filter @testflow/web build && pnpm --filter @testflow/api build && pnpm --filter @testflow/desktop dev
scripts.electron:pack: pnpm --filter @testflow/web build && pnpm --filter @testflow/api build && pnpm --filter @testflow/desktop build && pnpm --filter @testflow/desktop pack
scripts.electron:build: pnpm --filter @testflow/web build && pnpm --filter @testflow/api build && pnpm --filter @testflow/desktop build && pnpm --filter @testflow/desktop dist
